compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect brainstorm non-epic support
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and other existing documentation to reflect that /dso:brainstorm now accepts any ticket type.
**Why**: Documentation must reflect the new convert/enrich options so practitioners and agents know the capability exists.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md brainstorm references, quick reference table
- OUT: New documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md reflects that /dso:brainstorm accepts any ticket type with convert-to-epic and enrich-in-place options
  ← Satisfies: all success criteria (documentation reflects implemented behavior)

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
